PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-29-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Leticia Toledo for Marco Groppi and Robert Groppi.

Ms. Toledo stated that she filed a supplement on Monday which has the address of Robert Groppi. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is taken under submission for receipt of the supplement.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
